scripts.test: npm test --prefix server && npm test --prefix client
scripts.test:parallel: npx concurrently -g --no-color "npm test --prefix server" "npm test --prefix client"
scripts.test:watch: npx concurrently -g "npm run test:watch --prefix server" "npm run test:watch --prefix client"
scripts.test:coverage: npm test --prefix server -- --coverage && npm test --prefix client
